response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience in agentic AI systems at scale, fintech infrastructure, or regulated AI deployment, with no evidence of multi-agent architecture, real-time credit/risk systems, or leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people; his background is fragmented across unrelated domains (GIS, embedded, web tools) with no production AI system ownership or financial compliance experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication
Experience with event-driven systems and microservices in high-throughput contexts
concerns: No evidence of building or operating production multi-agent AI systems
Lacks fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, compliance, liquidity optimization)
No track record scaling engineering teams to 30+ or leading technical governance in venture-backed scale-ups
